channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Rubbish bins filled with construction black bags, 18th July
item.description:
Less than 24 hours, someone filled all of the rubbish and recycling bins with black bag garbage from a builder site.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Quilp Street, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bin overflowing with poo bags on the floor, 18th July
item.description:
This bin outside the primary school is constantly overflowing with poo bags all over the floor. This photo was taken today

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Thorndon Avenue, West Horndon, Brentwood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street light shining directly into bedroom, 18th July
item.description:
Severe light pollution from column 8 outside Dalston Lane Terrace. It shines right into our bedroom and disrupts sleep. Please fit a street light baffle to block the spill.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Fenton Close, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cars go around the corner too quickly, 18th July
item.description:
Especially at night — I am a cyclist — car pull out at this corner at top speed without slowing and cut lanes. There should be a give way or stop sign or even better, zebra crossing to incentivise drivers to slow down. Third time I pull myself out of a speeding driver cutting my lane while turning right from Yelverton to Hollman.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Holman Road, Battersea, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned vehicle, 18th July
item.description:
There is an untaxed abandoned silver van parked opposite number 1 Cloudesley Road, Bexleyheath, DA7 5EP. The number plate is RA54 EOF, which is not recognised on the DVLA database and appears to have been altered. The O looks to have been altered, possibly with black tape. The vehicle hasn't moved for at least 6 months and does not appear road worthy. Please can it be removed.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cloudesley Road, Upper Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: ALL lights!, 18th July
item.description:
No lights here are coded. Most don’t work and all need upgrading to LED. All need inspecting. Some trees also need cutting Access road and car park
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 111, Hayes Lane, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple drains full solid, 18th July
item.description:
Several drains are full solid on the access road. Reported several years ago and obviously never cleared
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 111, Hayes Lane, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox, 18th July
item.description:
Dead fox at side of road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Nightingale Road, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Kirb cleaning, 18th July
item.description:
Kirbs need cleaning and sweeping while area is disgusting
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 111, Hayes Lane, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Collection on rubbish, 18th July
item.description:
Please can a collection be arranged as our bin hasn’t been emptied for the last two collections… the pub customers from next door have at weekends been putting their rubbish into the bin and now their are flies and we can’t dispose of nappies

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 194, Ferndale Road, Brixton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Deep clean of path, gutters and bushes, 18th July
item.description:
Overgrown bushes, unswept path full of gravel. Needs a manual and electric deep clean of the whole path
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hayes Lane, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: James Watt Way/Pier Road/ Colebrook Street - Erith, 18th July
item.description:
Litter abounds. Five requests for thorough street cleaning in this area. which includes the pavements have now been posted & all have been ignored by the street cleaning department. Trigger & his multitask broom is urgently needed please.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): James Watt Way, North End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lights 53F-6 and 53F-7 still not working, 18th July
item.description:
Lights 53F-6 and 53F-7 still not working
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brook Way, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped bed, 18th July
item.description:
Dumped rubbish against my drive
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Frant Close, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Port bike left in permit parking area, 18th July
item.description:
Needs to be removed as this is not a valid area for port rental bikes to be parked. This needs to be removed as it is taking up vital permit parking space and also is a danger to private personal cars as they tip over and cause damage to private car property. Please kindly remove ASAP

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chiltern Street, Marylebone, City of Westminster
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: As there is still loads of trash bags in front of controller unable to gain access, 18th July
item.description:
As there is still loads of trash bags in front of controller unable to gain access
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kirkdale, Forest Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox, 18th July
item.description:
Dead fox in double bag at edge of property
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crescent Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pot hole at junction, 18th July
item.description:
There is a pothole that can be dangerous to bikers and cyclists.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Parkside Avenue, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping front of properties, 18th July
item.description:
Local residents leaving collection bags out days early - collection day in this area is Tuesday

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Garnham Close, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bike chained to street furniture, 18th July
item.description:
Bike chained to pedestrian hand rail

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Garnham Close, Hackney, London
